hero.title: About us
hero.description: Financial services form the backbone of every enterprise. They must work flawlessly to support your operations. We strive to be your dependable partner. Our technology provides intuitive tools backed by attentive support.

quote.text: "Conventional banks frequently let down business owners. We created AlpenStark to close that gap with personalized service and advanced solutions."
quote.author: Founder

story.title: Our story
story.p1: After fifteen years working within traditional banking, I saw firsthand how mainstream banks failed independent business owners, freelancers, and growing companies time and time again. Capable people were being turned away or lost in bureaucracy simply because they didn't fit a narrow profile.
story.p2: This is why I established AlpenStark—to build a financial institution that genuinely supports people with real goals. We designed a platform for those who need banking that adapts to them, not the other way around. By combining modern tech with real human support, we've removed the friction. Today, I'm proud to serve over 100,000 customers worldwide. Every client matters, and your success is our success.

contact.title: Speak with a real person
contact.description: Our support and sales professionals are here to address any questions you have. Whether it's a technical issue or a quick question, we provide the level of service we'd want to receive ourselves!
contact.formDescription: Complete the form below or email us at support@alpenstark.com. Our team will respond as quickly as possible.
contact.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
contact.error: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again.

hero.title: Manage your finances on your own schedule
hero.description: Take full control of your financial life. Access your funds securely and conveniently from anywhere at any time.
hero.feature1Desc: Your data and privacy are protected

section1.title: Manage your money with ease and precision
section1.description: Monitor your financial health and track activity across accounts, cards, and investments through our digital platform. Check balances, view transactions, process payments, open fixed-term deposits, and much more.

section2.title: Full transaction transparency
section2.description: Get access to complete data for every payment made. Download receipts, cancel pending transfers, or reuse payment details. Enjoy full control over your operations.

section3.title: Fast and intelligent payment processing
section3.description: Send payments to over 1,200 institutions or transfer funds between your accounts, to Swiss banks, and abroad. Fast, reliable, and secure transfers around the clock.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Looking for answers? Contact us, but first check the answers below — your question may have already been addressed.
faq.q1: What features does online banking offer?
faq.a1: Online banking allows you to check balances, transaction history, transfer funds, pay bills, create recurring payments, manage fixed-term deposits, export statements, edit your profile, and contact support. All tools for full control in one place.
faq.a2: Definitely. Registering for online banking gives you 24/7 access to your accounts, advanced security options, and the ability to manage your money when it's convenient for you. It's free and takes just a couple of minutes.
faq.q3: What should I do if I don't remember my password?
faq.a3: Simply click "Forgot Password" on the login screen. A secure reset link will be sent to your email. Follow the instructions to create a new password.
faq.a4: Very secure. Our online banking uses institutional-grade protection: 256-bit SSL encryption, multi-factor login, and constant fraud monitoring. Your information is protected according to the standards of leading Swiss banks.
faq.q5: What types of transfers are available?
faq.a5: Instant transfers between your own accounts, transfers to other Swiss and international accounts, setting up recurring payments, and scheduling future payments. Every transfer is protected and confirmed in real-time.
faq.a6: Absolutely. After logging in, you can write to our support team via secure chat. Online help is available during business hours.
faq.a7: Yes, you can pay any Swiss or international bill directly from online banking. Schedule one-time or automatic payments and track their history.
faq.q8: Can I track the status of bill payments?
faq.a8: Of course. Monitor all payments in real-time — see pending, completed, and processing transactions, as well as confirmation details. You will also receive notifications.

hero.title: Intelligent Currency Conversion
hero.description: Easily convert currencies with attractive rates and instant execution. Access 20+ currencies and digital assets through a single secure interface.

widget.adding: We are constantly adding new currencies to the list

section1.title: Global Currency Reach
section1.description: Access global financial markets through our full-featured currency exchange platform. Trade 20+ currencies and leading cryptocurrencies with enterprise-grade protection.

section2.title: Steps to Convert
section2.step1: Select your source and target currencies from our wide selection
section2.step2: Enter the amount you wish to convert
section2.step3: Check the exchange rate and transaction summary
section2.step4: Confirm the conversion and receive funds instantly

section3.title: Real-Time Market Rates
section3.description: Enjoy transparent pricing with market rates updating every second. Our powerful trading infrastructure ensures the most favorable exchange rates.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How often are exchange rates updated?
faq.a1: Our platform provides real-time exchange rates that are constantly updated during market hours. This ensures optimal pricing.
faq.q2: What fees apply to currency conversion?
faq.a2: We offer a transparent fee structure with competitive spreads included in our exchange rates. All fees are displayed upfront.
faq.a3: All currency conversions on our platform are executed instantly. Your funds become available immediately after confirmation.
faq.q4: Are there limits on the exchange amount?
faq.a4: Conversion limits depend on your account verification level and the selected currency pair. Higher verification levels unlock increased limits.
